The OTO script is completely different even if the product is exactly the same. So if I'm going from a free plus shipping and my first upsell video would never be this. This is a front end video where I'm driving traffic to this front end video. Because you're 100% right. If somebody's bought a free plus shipping offer, I don't need to go through this whole process with them. They've already said the first yes, the second yes is a million times easier and so we'll just jump right into this because the question, so you set me up perfect. I appreciate it. Yeah. No, but you are 100% right. And I relearned this lesson recently. We did an offer and I had my front end thing, it converted great, and then the upsell, I had the entire sales video like this where, excuse me, I'm reselling everybody on the whole thing and it bombed. I was like, what's going on? And one of my friends, luckily Tim Irwin, he bought the thing and then he saw the thing and he emailed me. He's like, man, this is awesome. He's like, but your upsell video sucked. I was like, what do you mean? He's like, well, it was a good video, but he's like, I already said yes, man. I just needed you to push me a little bit to get the next thing. I was like, really? And so I went back and I started looking at the videos that didn't look successful and the ones that bombed and sure enough, I found this really cool common thread. The ones that were successful all followed this script right here. Okay? So this is our upsell script. So if you're going from a free plus shipping to your next thing or you're going from the $37.97 product to the next thing, whatever it is, this is the next thing script. Okay? It's the OTO bump. It's on page 83. Does that make sense what he's asking you guys? Do y'all get what he's saying? Okay. So if I... It just takes five minutes to get someone to buy something. Yeah. So here's my free plus shipping or here's my $37 to $97 product or here's my $19.97 webinar, whatever it is. There's a script for this. That was the first script of who, what, why, where. This was the script, star story solution. This is the webinar script we'll be doing next. The next thing after any of these, so whatever the next thing is, is the OTO bump. Okay? So I'm not going from here to here. I'm going from here to here or here to here or here to here. I'm glad you brought that up though. Where? Yep. So who-it-where is like this, is this script for free plus shipping or dollar trials or very short, low, low barrier of entry purchases. That's $70. Exactly, yeah. So that's what my who-it-why-where script is. And I will go a little more expensive to like the $37.97, maybe the $197 range. I'm using star story solution. And I go high ticket, anything from $500 to $2,000, I'm doing the webinar script we'll be covering next. Cool. And then OTO bump. So after somebody said the very first yes on any of these things, then again now that they've said yes, now it's very simple to get them to say the second yes. Okay? And so it's a very shorter process. The second video shouldn't be any longer than three to five minutes. If you're doing a 20 minute video, a 20 minute upsell video, you're losing tons and tons of people. Okay? So this is how our OTO bump script typically works. The very first section of it is, let me just put it there live. The very first thing I'm doing is I'm confirming their initial decision. Congratulations, thank you so much for ordering your very first bottle of sassy grass. And I probably should put this in there. Because the other thing is I need to keep that loop open. I might add that to the graphic. So I'm confirming the initial decision and keeping the loop open. So congratulations on buying your very first bottle of sassy grass. You were going to love it. But don't go anywhere because, but wait, your order's not yet completed. Remember we were talking about that yesterday, two days ago, how if I close the loop, the conversions drop. So I want to keep that loop open. So I might add that. And the second part of the script is like, before you go on, I want to find out if you'd be interested in, this is called the 3x2x, which basically stands for, I'm going to 3x results twice as fast. So you bought this because you're trying to get more healthy. I'm going to show you a really quick way to get three times the results, or sorry, three times results in half as long, twice the speed. So I'm usually, and again, this will tweak depending on if your upsell is not necessarily speeding up their process. But most good upsells, you're going to take whatever they bought to the next level. It's the next thing we talked about. So you just bought this thing. I'm going to show you how to do this better, faster, whatever. Then I come back, and now I have to come back to them, and I want to make them feel really, really good about the initial purchase. Because the worst thing an upsell can do, and I've seen this happen all the time, people are like, you just bought this thing, but it doesn't actually work unless you buy this next thing. The best way to make your customers want to kill you really, really fast. And people do it all the time. It just drives me crazy. So I want to make sure that they realize that what they just bought was amazing. It is going to change your life like I told them initially. And so I want to confirm that. I want to confirm that you are one of the smartest people in the world. And the reason why is because you saw the value of what Sassay Graskit do for you. You saw how the benefits, you saw how it's going to help your family, you saw all this stuff. You're really, really smart, but I want to ask you a question. How would you like to have me help you do it faster or better? How would you like to have more information? How would you like to do whatever the next thing is? I'm introducing that. And then I come back, and I want to make them feel special, and they should feel special. And they offer you're making them on this page should be special. They can buy the same thing, they're exact same price somewhere else that's not right. That's what we call these special one-time offers. One of the worst things I think you can do, I've had three or four people ask me this weekend, like, I keep selling them my offers if they miss it. I don't do that because I feel like this is a special one-time offer that they get right now. So I make them a really good offer right now. And so I tell them this is an exclusive offer just for people who bought Dotcom's Secret Slabs. This is an exclusive offer only for people who just bought Sassay Graskit. I want them to feel exclusive. This is the cool thing that nobody else is getting. I like even going to the point of saying, like, in fact, if you go to whatever.com, you'll see I sell this normally for this price. But because you're here right now, I got this exclusive deal, this exclusive price, and you're going to love it. So your upsells convert really well. Then I transition over to what makes this upsell better. Usually it's something that's going to make you get your end goal faster, you get better results, whatever it might be, whatever that next thing is going to do for them. This is what we kind of tell you. This is all the stuff that's going to get. Now I introduce what's the one thing the upsell is going to do. What's the one core thing of the upsell? Very simple. So if you get this upsell, for Dotcom's Secret Slabs, a big thing is you were smart because you knew you needed faster to increase your conversions. But the best way to increase your conversions or the best way to make more money is to start getting more traffic to your website. So I'm going to show you guys a way to get more traffic faster, better, easier. That's what we're going to do. And so the one thing I'm going to show you guys now is how to get more traffic through my new traffic program, whatever it is. My folks down the one thing, and I kind of share this is what that one thing is. This is going to be more traffic, it's going to be better traffic, and I kind of explain what that is and why it's exciting and why they need it. Then after I introduce that one thing again, then I come back to future casting. Can you guys imagine what it's going to do for your business? Well, literally you're able to double as much traffic you get without spending any more time or energy or effort. What will that do for you? How much more money can you make from that? Without extra money, whose life can you affect? How many more people can you help? Whatever your goals are, what can you do with that? So I future cast again, then I come down and call the action. So all you got to do to add this to your order right now is click on this button and instantly will add this to your order to get it right away. Call the action. Then come back, I guarantee again. And don't worry, just like all my offers, you're a very special, you're a very cool guarantee if you don't like it for whatever reason. In the next 30 days, let me know and I won't bill you a penny. And also because you're taking action right now, I'm going to give you some more stuff. So here's a value stack. I'm also going to give you this and this and this. Again, just like the initial value stack, I'm not going to give them new things. I don't have time to explain all those things. This video needs to be more compact. But I'm saying what else can complement the one thing? Okay, plus you can get this and this and this, really quick thing. But a nice amount of one-time offers of scarcity is built in. But this offer is only available right here right now on this page. If you ever wanted to get in the future, you got to go to my site over here where it's twice as much money or you got to rebuy this product. It's just like right now it's half off, but it's only half off right now. So if you leave this page, it's gone forever. Let me know if you want it right now. Okay, this is my scarcity. Then I give them a call to action again. And I'm not doing the five testimonials about this product. I'm doing a testimonial rush. And I'm so sure about it, excuse me, after the second call to action, then I'm like, let me show other people have had success this as well. And I show a couple of videos person after person after person after person after person. And then maybe I'll do one more call to action in the end and that's kind of it. You see how the sales process is a lot shorter? They already said yes, they already got sold in the concept. The idea, whatever it is, all I have to do is just show them enough value in this next thing, the next one thing, how it's going to help them achieve whatever they already, they already committed to me that, hey Russell, I want to increase my conversions, which is going to make me more money. Okay, I made that commitment. I've already said the first yes. I'm going to say like, you got conversions, you want traffic? All right, cool, I'll get that as well. And say yes to that, like, hey, do you want this as well? All right, sure, I'll do that as well. Okay, so that's kind of what we're doing is just increasing and making the initial purchase better. And so because that script is very short and easy. Any questions about the Bump script? Yeah. So this is my personal opinion and a lot of people don't do this, but my own personal opinion, remember we talked yesterday a lot about when I'm building something, I have two goals. My point of sale funnel, right? And then I have like my back end funnels. Okay, so my point of sale funnel, my entire goal, like we said, you guys remember, is to break even, right? If I can break even my traffic costs, I just want here. So I'll have my front end, I'll have my OTO, whatever it is. Now for me personally, I hate tying continuity into any piece of this because continuity is either going to be a really, really, really good experience or really, really, really bad experience. So I personally hate tying continuity ever into the point of sale initial funnel. It always turns out bad for me. When I used to do free plus shipping, we always do forced continuity, it hurt. When I did upsells continuity, it is, so I don't, a person like that. Now I would say half of my industry put continuity in here and they do it that way. I just don't like it. I think it, anyway, that's my goal. My goal is just put a dollar in and get a dollar back out. Now over here, after we've gone, remember we talked about this like, like earlier we were talking about, we're buying traffic, we're trying to get somebody in initially and we're doing like the best sales process we possibly can. But after we get them in, now they know us, they like us, they trust us, they have attractive character stuff. And from here, I like creating, again, my high ticket stuff I'm selling, I have a continuity program back here I'm selling, things like that where I don't have to sell as aggressively as I do up here. It's more like, hey guys, here's this really cool thing I got, come over here and buy it, it's my continuity program. And I don't want to sell as hard because again, the attractive characters that they know me, they like me, they trust me. And people will know it's a continuity program because I'm selling a continuity program. I'm not selling a sneaky thing that's kind of getting them in, you know what I mean? It's not kind of my personal philosophy, but like I said, I see tons of people who hook continuity and upsell and hook it in different places, but I just, in the mastermind group two days ago or three days ago or whatever that first thing was, we talked a lot about, there's a book I read a while ago called The Ultimate Question. And the ultimate question, I remember I read this book back when we were doing all these like forced continuity, free plus shipping stuff and getting all these people in continuity. And the book talks about the difference between good profits and bad profits. It talks about like cell phone companies, like for example, I use AT&T forever, right? I had them and I hated them, but I never canceled, I was faithful for like five or six years and they were charging us like insane amounts of money. So finally, I decided to switch over, I called the cancel and they're like, oh, you shouldn't be on this data plan anyway, you should have been paying half what you were paying. And we'll drop the price and they start like chopping, they try to give me like this crazy deal to stay. I was like, if I've been overpaying for like five years, why wouldn't you have somebody on your team call me? Obviously, they're not going to do that because it takes away their profits. But is that good profit or bad profit? It's a bad profit, right? And that's what I felt when I read that book, I felt like this big ol' homerhead like, yeah, people are signing for these continuity programs, they're getting in, but just by the fact that all these people are calling and canceling and they're upset and that things are happening, I'm like, it's a good profits or bad profits, okay? And so for me, I want my business, I want to be able to sleep good at night, I want to come to an event and not feel guilty being here. I want to make sure that when I'm selling stuff, there's good profits versus bad profits. I think my personal belief is adding a continuity into an initial point of sale thing, the first introduction, most people are not going to know they're on continuity. No matter how much you put it in the fine printer anywhere, they're not going to know and it's just, it's not good profits. I want to focus on good profits versus bad profits. So that's my personal belief. There are much more aggressive ways to do it. It'll probably make you a lot more money short term, but I promise you long term, good profits will make you more money long term.
